companionBriefing.privacy: Companion-briefinger oppsummerer verifisert modulaktivitet — metadata, rolig tone, menneskelig kontroll.

companionWorkforceEngine.title: Companion Workforce Center
companionWorkforceEngine.subtitle: Koordiner spesialiserte Companions som team — harmoni, ikke hierarki. Mennesker leder; companions støtter innenfor styring. Distinkt fra Multi-Agent Collaboration på /app/agents og Companion Marketplace Fase 113.
companionWorkforceEngine.humanOversightRequired: Menneskelig tilsyn påkrevd — companions utvider aldri myndighet uten godkjenning
companionWorkforceEngine.philosophy: Filosofi — mennesker først, companionship før erstatning
companionWorkforceEngine.distinctionNote: Distinksjon fra Fase 74 agents og Fase 113 marketplace
companionWorkforceEngine.openConflicts: Åpne konflikter som venter på menneskelig gjennomgang
companionWorkforceEngine.companionLimitations: Companion-begrensninger — omgår aldri styring eller mennesker
companionWorkforceEngine.selfLoveConnection: Self Love-tilknytning — meningsfullt arbeid og psykologisk trygghet
companionWorkforceEngine.crossLinks: Relaterte flater — kun krysslenker, ikke duplisering

companionMarketplace.title: Companion Marketplace
companionMarketplace.subtitle: Pålitelige digitale medarbeidere — Companion Marketplace, Digital Employee Engine og Enterprise Digital Employee Center. Mennesker først. Teknologi deretter.
companionMarketplace.humanApprovalRequired: Menneskelig godkjenning kreves før aktivering — digitale medarbeidere, ikke chatboter
companionMarketplace.enterpriseCenterNote: Klargjør, revider, overvåk effekt og håndhev sikkerhet — obligatorisk 2FA for privilegerte Companion-roller.
companionMarketplace.crossLinks: Relaterte flater — distinkt fra Skills Marketplace

companionDeviceEcosystemEngine.title: Companion-enhetsøkosystem (no)
companionDeviceEcosystemEngine.subtitle: Tverr-enhet companion-orkestrering — veikart, kontinuitet og integrasjonslenker. Fase A.96 / Blueprint 36. (no)

workspaceProductivityHub.title: Arbeidsområde
workspaceProductivityHub.subtitle: Ditt personlige arbeidsområde for oppgaver, prioriteringer, påminnelser og daglig fokus — rolig struktur uten press.
workspaceProductivityHub.principle: Produktivitet skal redusere stress, ikke skape det. Aipify hjelper deg å fokusere på det som betyr mest.
workspaceProductivityHub.empty: Ingenting her ennå — opprett en oppgave eller notat når du er klar.
workspaceProductivityHub.searchPlaceholder: Søk i oppgaver, notater eller kategorier…
workspaceProductivityHub.youDecide: Du bestemmer — Aipify forbereder og foreslår; mennesker velger hva som skjer videre.

personalProductivityEngine.title: Personlig produktivitet
personalProductivityEngine.subtitle: Dine daglige briefinger, påminnelser og fokusanbefalinger — kun personlig metadata, du har kontrollen.
personalProductivityEngine.distinctionNote: Skilt fra organisasjonsoppgaver og assistentminne — dette er din personlige produktivitetsoverflate.

proactiveCompanionEngine.title: Proaktiv følgesvenn
proactiveCompanionEngine.subtitle: Tidsriktig, ansvarlig proaktiv assistanse — støttende veiledning før ting blir presserende. ABOS Assistance-søyle.
proactiveCompanionEngine.noNudges: Ingen ventende nudges — Aipify tilbyr veiledning når relevant kontekst vises.

companionIdentityEngine.title: Companion-identitet
companionIdentityEngine.subtitle: Enhetlig companion-identitet på tvers av ABOS-moduler — konsistent personlighet, atferdsstandarder og interaksjonsstil.
companionIdentityEngine.distinctionNote: Enhetlig companion-identitetsorkestrering — ikke Identity Engine Phase 34, Brand Identity, Humor & Personal Connection, Companion Presence A.67 eller Purpose & Values A.82.
companionIdentityEngine.playfulMomentsNote: Støtter relasjoner — distraherer aldri. Deaktivert i alvorlige kontekster.

humanPartnershipEvolution.title: Human-Aipify-partnerskap og companion-evolusjon
humanPartnershipEvolution.subtitle: Sunne, styrkende relasjoner med Aipify Companions — partnerskap, ikke erstatning. Fase 99 utvider Companion Identity A.84.

aipifyDesktopCompanionCreativeBridgeEngi.title: Desktop Companion
aipifyDesktopCompanionCreativeBridgeEngi.subtitle: Universal Knowledge Era (234–238). Bridge Companion supports approved application detection, consent flows, creative and business app bridges, and governed guided actions. Supports users — does NOT access applications without permission. Growth Partner — never Affiliate.
aipifyDesktopCompanionCreativeBridgeEngi.loading: Forbereder Desktop Companion & Creative Bridge overview…
aipifyDesktopCompanionCreativeBridgeEngi.humanOversightRequired: Human oversight required — users retain final control over actions; Bridge Companion supports only
aipifyDesktopCompanionCreativeBridgeEngi.eraOpenerNote: Cross-link only — do not duplicate Aipify Studio, Document Intelligence, Executive Cockpit, Knowledge Center, Enterprise Notification Engine, or Trust Center RPCs.
aipifyDesktopCompanionCreativeBridgeEngi.companionLabel: Bridge Companion — supports in-app guidance, never replaces user control
aipifyDesktopCompanionCreativeBridgeEngi.crossLinks: Related surfaces — cross-link only, do not duplicate
aipifyDesktopCompanionCreativeBridgeEngi.companionLimitations: Bridge Companion limitations — does NOT access applications without permission, bypass session consent, or skip session audit logging

phase236.mission: Bridge Companion supports application session visibility — users retain final control over all actions.
phase236.philosophy: People First. RBAC-protected desktop companion scaffolds. Growth Partner terminology — never Affiliate.

trustAdoption.title: Tillit og adopsjon
trustAdoption.subtitle: Systematically increase trust and accelerate adoption — transforming occasional use into daily reliance through competence, transparency, and value.
trustAdoption.privacyNote: Adoption through value — never manipulate users into dependence.

companionMarketplaceAction.title: Handlingsøkosystem
companionMarketplaceAction.subtitle: Extend companion capabilities through approved action providers, integrations, and specialized companion skills — a trusted ecosystem, not everything built in-house.
companionMarketplaceAction.packageRequired: Upgrade package required to activate this capability.
companionMarketplaceAction.noRecommendations: No recommendations yet — suggestions appear when observed value supports them.
companionMarketplaceAction.noInstalled: No capabilities installed yet. Start with one low-risk capability.
companionMarketplaceAction.privacyNote: Recommendations based on observed value — never aggressive upselling.

lifeEvents.title: Livshendelser
lifeEvents.subtitle: Remember, prepare for, and act upon important personal and professional moments — proactive care that strengthens relationships, never replaces them.
lifeEvents.executeActions: Allow Aipify to execute approved actions
lifeEvents.optOut: Pause all proactive life event care
lifeEvents.snooze: Remind me closer to the event
lifeEvents.privacyNote: Supportive, never intrusive — you always decide.

companionIdentityRelationship.title: Identitet og relasjon
companionIdentityRelationship.subtitle: Build a trusted, professional, human-centered companion identity — consistent, familiar, and recognizably Aipify while adapting to your preferences.
companionIdentityRelationship.privacyNote: Familiarity, not unhealthy attachment — you remain in control.

presenceContinuity.title: Tilstedeværelse og kontinuitet
presenceContinuity.subtitle: Maintain a continuous, reassuring companion presence — resume conversations, tasks, and workflows without losing momentum.
presenceContinuity.privacyNote: Calm presence — supportive observations, never intrusive.

companionActionMarketplace.title: Companion-handlinger
companionActionMarketplace.subtitle: Expand real-world capabilities through a secure marketplace of approved action providers — transportation, deliveries, bookings, gifting, and more.

companionActionMemory.title: Handlingsminne
companionActionMemory.subtitle: Remember approved action preferences and recurring choices — reduce friction without reducing control.
companionActionMemory.privacyNote: Granular control — explain what is remembered, support complete deletion.

companionOrchestration.title: Orkestrering
companionOrchestration.subtitle: Aipify coordinates installed Companion capabilities so you experience one unified Companion — not dozens of disconnected assistants.
companionOrchestration.testPlaceholder: Describe what you need help with…

companionContextEngine.title: Companion Context Engine
companionContextEngine.subtitle: Understand what is happening across your work environment so Aipify assistance becomes more relevant and valuable.
companionContextEngine.principle: Context before recommendations. Permission-first access. Privacy by design.
companionContextEngine.privacyNote: Aipify only uses metadata from approved, authorized context sources — never information outside granted permissions.
companionContextEngine.emptyTitle: No context sources are currently connected.
companionContextEngine.emptyBody: Connect systems and workflows to help Aipify provide more relevant assistance.
companionContextEngine.accessDenied: Companion context access requires an active organization membership.

faq.title: Companion Context Engine FAQ
faq.whatIs: What is the Companion Context Engine?
faq.whatIsAnswer: The Companion Context Engine helps Aipify understand what is happening across your work environment so assistance becomes more relevant and useful.
faq.autoAccessAnswer: No. Aipify only uses information from systems and sources that have been explicitly connected and authorized.
faq.whyImportantAnswer: Context allows Aipify to provide assistance that reflects current priorities, tasks and organizational activity rather than generic responses.

companionMemoryEngine.title: Companion Memory Expansion Engine
companionMemoryEngine.subtitle: Long-term memory for Aipify Companion — approved information that makes assistance increasingly valuable over time.
companionMemoryEngine.loading: Aipify is reviewing available memory context...
companionMemoryEngine.principle: Memory must be transparent. Users remain in control. Trust before automation.
companionMemoryEngine.privacyNote: Aipify never treats low-confidence memories as facts. Memory remains transparent and manageable.
companionMemoryEngine.emptyTitle: No memories have been created yet.
companionMemoryEngine.emptyBody: As you work with Aipify, approved memories help the Companion provide increasingly personalized assistance.
companionMemoryEngine.accessDenied: Companion memory access requires an active organization membership.

faq.title: Companion Memory FAQ
faq.whatIsAnswer: Companion Memory allows Aipify to remember approved information so assistance becomes more personalized and useful over time.
faq.control: Can I control what Aipify remembers?
faq.controlAnswer: Yes. Memory remains transparent and manageable through the Memory Review Center.
faq.deleteAnswer: Yes. Authorized users may review, edit, archive or delete memories.

companionRecommendationEngine.title: Companion Recommendation Engine
companionRecommendationEngine.subtitle: Intelligent, contextual and actionable recommendations — Aipify suggests, humans decide.
companionRecommendationEngine.principle: Explain every recommendation. Humans remain in control. Transparency before automation.
companionRecommendationEngine.privacyNote: Recommendations are suggestions only. Final decisions always remain with users and leadership.
companionRecommendationEngine.emptyTitle: No recommendations are available at the moment.
companionRecommendationEngine.emptyBody: As Aipify learns more about your workflows and priorities, recommendations will become increasingly personalized.
companionRecommendationEngine.accessDenied: Recommendation access requires an active organization membership.

faq.title: Recommendation Engine FAQ
faq.whatIsAnswer: The Recommendation Engine helps Aipify identify opportunities, priorities and actions that may improve productivity, operations and organizational performance.
faq.decisions: Can Aipify make decisions for me?
faq.decisionsAnswer: No. Recommendations are suggestions only. Final decisions always remain with users and leadership.
faq.explanationsAnswer: Transparency builds trust and helps users understand why recommendations are being made.

companionProactiveInsightsEngine.title: Companion Proactive Insights Engine
companionProactiveInsightsEngine.subtitle: Meaningful observations and patterns surfaced before you ask — Aipify observes, humans decide.
companionProactiveInsightsEngine.principle: Surface meaningful observations. Explain reasoning. High signal, low noise.
companionProactiveInsightsEngine.privacyNote: Insights are informational and advisory. Users remain responsible for decisions and actions.
companionProactiveInsightsEngine.emptyTitle: No proactive insights are available yet.
companionProactiveInsightsEngine.emptyBody: As Aipify learns more about organizational activity, proactive insights will become increasingly valuable.
companionProactiveInsightsEngine.accessDenied: Proactive insights access requires an active organization membership.

faq.title: Proactive Insights FAQ
faq.whatAreAnswer: Proactive Insights help Aipify identify important observations and patterns before users explicitly ask.
faq.autoActionAnswer: No. Insights are informational and advisory. Users remain responsible for decisions and actions.
faq.howGeneratedAnswer: Insights are generated from approved context sources, activity patterns and organizational signals.

companionPersonalizationEngine.title: Companion Personalization Engine
companionPersonalizationEngine.subtitle: Adapt communication, briefings and assistance to your preferred way of working — with organizational governance preserved.
companionPersonalizationEngine.loading: Aipify is adapting to your preferred working style...
companionPersonalizationEngine.principle: Adapt to the user. Preserve trust. Aipify identity remains consistent — personalization adjusts style, not core values.
companionPersonalizationEngine.privacyNote: Personalization changes presentation and interaction style, not permissions or security controls.
companionPersonalizationEngine.emptyTitle: No personalization preferences have been configured yet.
companionPersonalizationEngine.emptyBody: Aipify can adapt to your preferred way of working while maintaining organizational standards.
companionPersonalizationEngine.accessDenied: Personalization access requires an active organization membership.

faq.title: Companion Personalization FAQ
faq.whatIsAnswer: Companion Personalization allows Aipify to adapt communication, briefings and assistance to individual user preferences.
faq.controlAnswer: Yes. Users may review, edit or reset personalization settings at any time.
faq.securityAnswer: No. Personalization changes presentation and interaction style, not permissions or security controls.

companionDailyBriefing.title: Daily Briefing Center
companionDailyBriefing.subtitle: Start your day with clarity — a personalized overview of priorities, events, insights and actions that matter most.
companionDailyBriefing.loading: Aipify is preparing your daily briefing...
companionDailyBriefing.principle: Start the day with clarity. Surface what matters most. Signal over noise.
companionDailyBriefing.privacyNote: Briefings use approved context only. Personalization controls detail level via the Personalization Engine.
companionDailyBriefing.emptyTitle: No daily briefing is available yet.
companionDailyBriefing.emptyBody: Aipify will begin generating daily briefings as activity and context become available.
companionDailyBriefing.accessDenied: Daily briefing access requires an active organization membership.

faq.title: Daily Briefing Center FAQ
faq.whatIs: What is the Daily Briefing Center?
faq.whatIsAnswer: The Daily Briefing Center provides a personalized summary of priorities, events, insights and actions relevant to your workday.
faq.howGeneratedAnswer: Briefings are generated using approved context, memory, recommendations, insights and organizational activity.
faq.customizeAnswer: Yes. Briefing style and detail level are controlled through the Personalization Engine.

companionWorkPrioritization.title: Work Prioritization
companionWorkPrioritization.subtitle: Identify, organize and focus on the most important work — transparent recommendations, human decisions.
companionWorkPrioritization.principle: Focus on what matters. Reduce decision fatigue. Support human judgment.
companionWorkPrioritization.privacyNote: Aipify recommends priorities with transparent reasoning. Users remain responsible for decisions.
companionWorkPrioritization.emptyBody: As tasks, projects and activity increase, Aipify will help identify what deserves attention first.
companionWorkPrioritization.accessDenied: Work prioritization access requires an active organization membership.

faq.title: Work Prioritization FAQ
faq.whatIsAnswer: Work Prioritization helps users focus on the activities most likely to create value, reduce risk and support organizational goals.
faq.canDecideAnswer: No. Aipify provides recommendations. Users remain responsible for decisions and execution.
faq.howCalculatedAnswer: Priorities are based on approved context sources including deadlines, impact, dependencies, workload and organizational objectives.

companionFollowUp.title: Follow-Ups
companionFollowUp.subtitle: Consistently follow through on commitments, conversations, meetings and responsibilities — transparent and configurable.
companionFollowUp.principle: Help users keep commitments. Improve accountability. Support trust and reliability.
companionFollowUp.privacyNote: Aipify assists with follow-up recommendations. Users remain responsible for decisions and communication.
companionFollowUp.emptyBody: Aipify will help ensure important commitments do not fall through the cracks.
companionFollowUp.accessDenied: Follow-up access requires an active organization membership.

faq.title: Follow-Up Engine FAQ
faq.whatIsAnswer: The Follow-Up Engine helps users track commitments, conversations and responsibilities that require future action.
faq.remindersAnswer: Yes. Aipify can generate reminders based on user preferences and permissions.
faq.whyImportantAnswer: Consistent follow-up improves accountability, customer experience and organizational execution.

companionMemoryCenter.title: Companion Memory Center
companionMemoryCenter.subtitle: Aipify husker forpliktelser, følger opp uferdig arbeid og hjelper deg å holde orden — med full transparens og kontroll.
companionMemoryCenter.philosophy: Aipify skal ikke bare svare på spørsmål. Aipify husker det som betyr noe og følger opp når det er passende — du bestemmer alltid.
companionMemoryCenter.privacyNote: Kun metadata — Aipify lagrer aldri rå chattranskripter i minnesenteret.
companionMemoryCenter.emptyState: Ingen elementer i denne seksjonen ennå.
companionMemoryCenter.accessDenied: Companion Memory Center krever aktiv organisasjonstilgang.
companionMemoryCenter.detectPlaceholder: Prøv: Husk å ringe leverandøren i morgen…
companionMemoryCenter.detectFound: Aipify gjenkjente en forpliktelse. Lagre når du er klar.
companionMemoryCenter.detectNotFound: Ingen forpliktelsesmønster funnet. Prøv formuleringer som «Påminn meg om å…» eller «Jeg må…»

companionRelationshipIntelligence.title: Relationship Intelligence
companionRelationshipIntelligence.subtitle: Strengthen and maintain important business relationships — advisory insights, human connection first.
companionRelationshipIntelligence.principle: People first. Relationships matter. Aipify assists — never replaces human connection.
companionRelationshipIntelligence.privacyNote: Relationship intelligence is advisory only. Humans remain responsible for relationship management.
companionRelationshipIntelligence.emptyTitle: No relationship insights are available yet.
companionRelationshipIntelligence.emptyBody: Aipify helps organizations build stronger and more consistent professional relationships.
companionRelationshipIntelligence.accessDenied: Relationship intelligence access requires an active organization membership.

faq.title: Relationship Intelligence FAQ
faq.whatIsAnswer: Relationship Intelligence helps organizations maintain and strengthen important professional relationships.
faq.autoManageAnswer: No. Aipify provides insights, reminders and recommendations while humans remain responsible for relationship management.
faq.whyImportantAnswer: Strong relationships improve customer retention, partnerships, employee engagement and long-term business success.

companionExecutiveLayer.title: Executive Companion
companionExecutiveLayer.subtitle: Unified executive experience — strategic clarity, actionable guidance, Companion Golden Rule enforced.
companionExecutiveLayer.loading: Aipify is preparing your executive companion briefing...
companionExecutiveLayer.principle: One place for executive visibility. High signal, low noise. Human decisions remain required.
companionExecutiveLayer.privacyNote: Aipify provides context and recommendations. Leadership remains responsible for decisions.
companionExecutiveLayer.goldenRule: Observation → Explanation → Impact → Recommendation → Effort → Value
companionExecutiveLayer.emptyBody: As organizational activity grows, Aipify will provide increasingly valuable executive guidance.
companionExecutiveLayer.accessDenied: Executive Companion access requires owner, executive or authorized leadership role.

faq.title: Executive Companion FAQ
faq.whatIsAnswer: The Executive Companion helps leaders understand priorities, opportunities, risks and organizational activity from a single workspace.
faq.makesDecisionsAnswer: No. Aipify provides context, recommendations and intelligence. Leadership remains responsible for decisions.
faq.whyUseAnswer: Executive Companion reduces information overload and helps leaders focus on what matters most.

companionRelationshipEngine.title: Companion-relasjon
companionRelationshipEngine.subtitle: Identitet, personlighet, kommunikasjonspreferanser, tillit og langsiktig companionship med Aipify.
companionRelationshipEngine.accessRequiredBody: Companion-relasjon krever aktiv plan og riktige tillatelser.
companionRelationshipEngine.identityNotToolNote: Aipify er en Companion — ikke en chatbot, assistent eller generisk verktøy.
companionRelationshipEngine.governanceUserCanReview: Brukere kan gjennomgå lagrede preferanser og godkjente minner.
companionRelationshipEngine.governanceUserCanDisable: Brukere kan deaktivere personalisering når som helst.

companionExperience.title: Aipify Companion
companionExperience.subtitle: Din pålitelige forretningsfølgesvenn — veiledning, kontekst og neste steg på tvers av organisasjonen.
companionExperience.inputPlaceholder: Hva kan Aipify hjelpe deg med i dag?
companionExperience.capabilitiesTitle: Hva Aipify kan hjelpe deg med
companionExperience.emptyWelcomeTitle: Aipify er klar til å hjelpe
companionExperience.emptyWelcomeBody: Spør om organisasjonen, drift, support eller hva du bør fokusere på neste. Aipify forbereder veiledning — du bestemmer hva som gjøres.
companionExperience.errorBody: Aipify kunne ikke fullføre forespørselen. Prøv igjen.
companionExperience.noResults: Aipify fant ingen treff i godkjent kunnskap. Du kan opprette en supportforespørsel for menneskelig hjelp.
companionExperience.sessionConversationUnavailable: Den forrige samtalen kunne ikke gjenopprettes. Du kan starte en ny nedenfor.

orgStatus.title: Organisasjonsstatus
orgStatus.description: Oversikt over arbeidsområdets helse, aktivitet og elementer som krever oppmerksomhet.

recentEvents.title: Siste hendelser
recentEvents.description: Hva som endret seg siden sist innlogging — godkjenninger, support og oppdateringer.

supportCases.title: Support og saker
supportCases.description: Åpne supportforespørsler og hvordan eskalere med kontekst.

customerSuccess.title: Kundesuksess
customerSuccess.description: Adopsjon, helsesignaler og anbefalte neste steg.

knowledgeFaq.title: Kunnskap og FAQ
knowledgeFaq.description: Godkjente svar og prosedyrer fra Knowledge Center.

whatNow.title: Hva bør jeg gjøre nå?
whatNow.description: Prioriterte anbefalinger basert på din nåværende kontekst.

capabilities.guidance: Operativ veiledning med kontekst og anbefalte neste steg
capabilities.support: Knowledge Center-søk og forberedelse av supportforespørsler

contextSuggestions.billingUpgrade: Hvilke oppgraderingsalternativer finnes for planen min?

contextSuggestions.checkMySetup: Kan du sjekke om integrasjonsoppsettet mitt ser riktig ut?

companionExperience.feedbackThanks: Takk — tilbakemeldingen din hjelper Aipify å bli bedre.
companionExperience.feedbackOrgConfirmThanks: Bekreftet for organisasjonen. Dette registreres i revisjonsloggen.
companionExperience.feedbackOrgConfirmBlockedHint: Svaret brukte ikke verifiserte live integrasjonsdata.
companionExperience.supportEscalationHint: Trenger du fortsatt menneskelig hjelp, kan du opprette en supportforespørsel med denne konteksten.
